requirement_topic.en: Carbon Footprint Declaration — Sodium-Ion Industrial Batteries
requirement_topic.zh: 碳足迹声明——钠离子工业电池
requirement_topic.zht: 碳足跡聲明——鈉離子工業電池

summary.en: Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 applies to ALL battery chemistries without exception, explicitly including sodium-ion. Industrial batteries with a capacity of 2 kWh or above — a category that covers virtually all stationary Na-ion BESS units — must carry a carbon footprint declaration (CFD) calculated per lifecycle stage using a harmonised EU methodology. The CFD obligation for industrial batteries became mandatory from 18 February 2026. The calculation methodology and performance classes are defined via delegated acts adopted by the European Commission; the specific delegated act for industrial batteries was expected by late 2025 [UNVERIFIED — publication status as of 2026-06-12 not confirmed from primary source].
summary.zh: 法规（EU）2023/1542适用于所有电池化学体系，毫无例外，明确包括钠离子电池。容量达2 kWh或以上的工业电池——几乎所有固定式钠离子储能系统（BESS）均属此类——须按生命周期阶段申报碳足迹（CFD），采用欧盟统一方法计算。工业电池CFD义务自2026年2月18日起强制执行。计算方法及性能等级通过欧盟委员会授权法规规定；针对工业电池的具体授权法规预计于2025年底前出台 [UNVERIFIED — 截至2026-06-12，一次信息来源未确认出版状态]。
summary.zht: 法規（EU）2023/1542適用於所有電池化學體系，毫無例外，明確包括鈉離子電池。容量達2 kWh或以上的工業電池——幾乎所有固定式鈉離子儲能系統（BESS）均屬此類——須按生命週期階段申報碳足跡（CFD），採用歐盟統一方法計算。工業電池CFD義務自2026年2月18日起強制執行。計算方法及性能等級通過歐盟委員會授權法規規定；針對工業電池的具體授權法規預計於2025年底前出台 [UNVERIFIED — 截至2026-06-12，一次信息來源未確認出版狀態]。

standards_or_laws: Regulation (EU) 2023/1542, Articles 7 and 8 (carbon footprint — applies to all chemistries including sodium-ion)
Regulation (EU) 2023/1542, Article 2 (scope — no chemistry exclusions)
ISO 14067 (referenced lifecycle GHG methodology basis)
Delegated act on CFD calculation rules for industrial batteries [UNVERIFIED — adoption and OJ publication status not confirmed as of 2026-06-12]

summary.en: No mandatory Chinese equivalent for sodium-ion or any battery chemistry. China's voluntary product carbon footprint standard GB/T 24067-2024 (aligned with ISO 14067) exists but carries no binding enforcement. Provincial pilot carbon-labelling schemes are patchwork and do not cover batteries specifically. The Chinese sodium-ion battery sector has no industry-specific CFD guidance as of 2026-06-12.
summary.zh: 钠离子电池及任何电池化学体系均无中国强制对等规定。中国自愿性产品碳足迹标准GB/T 24067-2024（与ISO 14067对应）存在，但不具强制约束力。各省试点碳标签计划零散，未专门覆盖电池。截至2026-06-12，中国钠离子电池行业尚无具体CFD指引。
summary.zht: 鈉離子電池及任何電池化學體系均無中國強制對等規定。中國自願性產品碳足跡標準GB/T 24067-2024（與ISO 14067對應）存在，但不具強制約束力。各省試點碳標籤計劃零散，未專門覆蓋電池。截至2026-06-12，中國鈉離子電池行業尚無具體CFD指引。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 24067-2024 (voluntary — product carbon footprint quantification, not battery-specific)
No binding CN battery CFD regulation as of 2026-06-12

gap.en: Chinese Na-ion BESS manufacturers face no domestic CFD obligation, while EU law mandates one from 18 February 2026 for all industrial batteries 2 kWh and above regardless of chemistry. Establishing a lifecycle GHG inventory (cradle-to-gate at minimum), engaging an accredited third-party verifier, and integrating EU-format CFD declarations into product documentation represents a significant new compliance burden for which most Chinese Na-ion producers are currently unprepared.
gap.zh: 中国钠离子BESS制造商在国内没有CFD义务，而欧盟法律自2026年2月18日起，对所有2 kWh及以上工业电池强制要求申报碳足迹，不论化学体系。建立生命周期温室气体清单（至少覆盖从摇篮到大门）、委托有资质的第三方核查机构，并将符合欧盟格式的CFD声明纳入产品文件，对大多数中国钠离子生产商而言是重大新合规负担，目前普遍尚未准备就绪。
gap.zht: 中國鈉離子BESS製造商在國內沒有CFD義務，而歐盟法律自2026年2月18日起，對所有2 kWh及以上工業電池強制要求申報碳足跡，不論化學體系。建立生命週期溫室氣體清單（至少覆蓋從搖籃到大門）、委託有資質的第三方核查機構，並將符合歐盟格式的CFD聲明納入產品文件，對大多數中國鈉離子生產商而言是重大新合規負擔，目前普遍尚未準備就緒。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (EU) — all industrial batteries 2 kWh and above (including Na-ion) from 18 February 2026

source.publisher: Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: Critical gap — obligation already in force as of 2026. Na-ion chemistry receives no exemption. Chinese manufacturers exporting Na-ion BESS to Europe must have initiated CFD programmes; those who have not are currently non-compliant. Informational only — seek qualified legal and technical advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: 关键差距——义务自2026年起已生效。钠离子化学体系不享有豁免。出口欧洲的中国钠离子BESS制造商须已启动CFD计划；尚未启动者目前处于不合规状态。仅供参考，请咨询合格法律及技术顾问。
compliance_verdict.zht: 關鍵差距——義務自2026年起已生效。鈉離子化學體系不享有豁免。出口歐洲的中國鈉離子BESS製造商須已啟動CFD計劃；尚未啟動者目前處於不合規狀態。僅供參考，請咨詢合格法律及技術顧問。

requirement_topic.en: CE Marking, Conformity Assessment & Performance Standards — Sodium-Ion
requirement_topic.zh: CE标志、合规评估与性能标准——钠离子
requirement_topic.zht: CE標誌、合規評估與性能標準——鈉離子

summary.en: All batteries placed on the EU market under Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 must bear CE marking, supported by a completed conformity assessment and an EU Declaration of Conformity (DoC). Sodium-ion batteries are explicitly within scope — the Regulation contains no chemistry-based exemptions. Industrial batteries (including Na-ion BESS) must meet electrochemical performance and durability requirements set out in Article 10 and Annex IV: minimum capacity retention, energy efficiency, and cycle life benchmarks. The specific minimum threshold values for industrial batteries are defined by delegated acts; as sodium-ion is an emerging chemistry, the Commission is required to review and adapt performance requirements as the technology matures [UNVERIFIED — whether Na-ion-specific thresholds have been adopted as of 2026-06-12 is not confirmed from primary source]. Conformity assessment for industrial batteries not using novel chemistries may be conducted via internal control (Annex VIII Module A); third-party notified-body involvement is required where harmonised standards do not exist.
summary.zh: 根据法规（EU）2023/1542投放欧盟市场的所有电池须加贴CE标志，需完成合规评估并发布欧盟合格声明（DoC）。钠离子电池明确在适用范围内——法规不含任何基于化学体系的豁免。工业电池（含钠离子BESS）须符合第10条及附件四规定的电化学性能和耐久性要求：最低容量保持率、能效及循环寿命基准值。工业电池的具体最低门槛值通过授权法规规定；由于钠离子是新兴化学体系，欧盟委员会须随技术成熟对性能要求进行审查和调整 [UNVERIFIED — 截至2026-06-12，是否已通过钠离子专项门槛值，尚未从一次信息来源确认]。未采用新型化学体系的工业电池合规评估可通过内部控制方式进行（附件八A模块）；在缺乏协调标准的情况下，须由第三方公告机构参与。
summary.zht: 根據法規（EU）2023/1542投放歐盟市場的所有電池須加貼CE標誌，需完成合規評估並發佈歐盟合格聲明（DoC）。鈉離子電池明確在適用範圍內——法規不含任何基於化學體系的豁免。工業電池（含鈉離子BESS）須符合第10條及附件四規定的電化學性能和耐久性要求：最低容量保持率、能效及循環壽命基準值。工業電池的具體最低門檻值通過授權法規規定；由於鈉離子是新興化學體系，歐盟委員會須隨技術成熟對性能要求進行審查和調整 [UNVERIFIED — 截至2026-06-12，是否已通過鈉離子專項門檻值，尚未從一次信息來源確認]。未採用新型化學體系的工業電池合規評估可通過內部控制方式進行（附件八A模塊）；在缺乏協調標準的情況下，須由第三方公告機構參與。

standards_or_laws: Regulation (EU) 2023/1542, Articles 10 and 18-24 (performance, CE marking, conformity assessment)
Regulation (EU) 2023/1542, Annexes IV, VIII, IX
Regulation (EU) 2023/1542, Article 2 (chemistry-neutral scope)
Harmonised EN standards under the Battery Regulation [UNVERIFIED — mandate to CEN/CENELEC; harmonised standards not yet listed in OJ as of 2026-06-12]
Delegated acts on performance thresholds for industrial batteries [UNVERIFIED — adoption status as of 2026-06-12 not confirmed]

summary.en: China has no equivalent to the EU Battery Regulation CE conformity regime for sodium-ion batteries. The primary Chinese standard for stationary lithium-ion BESS is GB/T 36276-2023; there is no equivalent GB standard specifically for sodium-ion BESS as of 2026-06-12 [UNVERIFIED]. CCC (China Compulsory Certification) does not currently list stationary Na-ion batteries as a mandatory category. Some Chinese manufacturers voluntarily test against IEC 62619 (general safety for secondary Li-ion and, by adaptation, other chemistries).
summary.zh: 中国对钠离子电池无对应欧盟电池法规CE合规体系。固定式锂离子BESS的主要中国标准为GB/T 36276-2023；截至2026-06-12，尚无专门针对钠离子BESS的对应GB标准 [UNVERIFIED]。CCC目前未将固定式钠离子电池列为强制认证类别。部分中国制造商自愿参照IEC 62619（二次锂离子电池通用安全，可延伸适用于其他化学体系）进行测试。
summary.zht: 中國對鈉離子電池無對應歐盟電池法規CE合規體系。固定式鋰離子BESS的主要中國標準為GB/T 36276-2023；截至2026-06-12，尚無專門針對鈉離子BESS的對應GB標準 [UNVERIFIED]。CCC目前未將固定式鈉離子電池列為強制認證類別。部分中國製造商自願參照IEC 62619（二次鋰離子電池通用安全，可延伸適用於其他化學體系）進行測試。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36276-2023 (lithium-ion batteries for electrochemical energy storage — no Na-ion equivalent confirmed as of 2026-06-12)
IEC 62619:2022 (voluntary; secondary cells and batteries — safety requirements, adaptable to Na-ion)
CCC system — Na-ion stationary batteries not listed as mandatory category as of 2026-06-12 [UNVERIFIED]

gap.en: Sodium-ion is a chemistry for which harmonised EU standards under the Battery Regulation are still being developed. This creates a double compliance challenge: manufacturers must satisfy CE marking requirements at a time when harmonised test standards do not yet exist, meaning notified-body involvement and more complex conformity routes may be required. Simultaneously, no Chinese domestic standard or certification programme mirrors the EU performance-and-durability or conformity-assessment framework for Na-ion BESS, meaning exporters cannot leverage domestic certification as a stepping stone.
gap.zh: 钠离子是一种化学体系，欧盟电池法规下的协调标准仍在制定中。这带来双重合规挑战：制造商须在协调测试标准尚不存在的情况下满足CE标志要求，意味着可能需要公告机构参与，并采用更复杂的合规路径。与此同时，中国国内无对应欧盟钠离子BESS性能、耐久性及合规评估框架的标准或认证体系，出口商无法以国内认证作为过渡跳板。
gap.zht: 鈉離子是一種化學體系，歐盟電池法規下的協調標準仍在制定中。這帶來雙重合規挑戰：製造商須在協調測試標準尚不存在的情況下滿足CE標誌要求，意味著可能需要公告機構參與，並採用更複雜的合規路徑。與此同時，中國國內無對應歐盟鈉離子BESS性能、耐久性及合規評估框架的標準或認證體系，出口商無法以國內認證作為過渡跳板。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (EU) — CE marking and conformity assessment required for all batteries including Na-ion placed on EU market; performance thresholds under delegated acts [UNVERIFIED — exact dates for Na-ion-specific acts not confirmed as of 2026-06-12]
mandatory_status.cn: No mandatory CN conformity regime for Na-ion stationary batteries as of 2026-06-12 [UNVERIFIED]

source.publisher: Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: High gap with additional uncertainty for Na-ion. The chemistry-neutral scope of the Regulation means Na-ion is fully subject to CE marking and performance requirements, yet the harmonised standards needed to demonstrate conformity efficiently are still under development. Chinese Na-ion BESS exporters should engage EU notified bodies early. Informational only — seek qualified legal and technical advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: 差距显著，钠离子存在额外不确定性。法规化学体系中立的适用范围意味着钠离子电池须全面遵守CE标志及性能要求，但便于高效证明合规的协调标准仍在制定中。中国钠离子BESS出口商应尽早与欧盟公告机构接触。仅供参考，请咨询合格法律及技术顾问。
compliance_verdict.zht: 差距顯著，鈉離子存在額外不確定性。法規化學體系中立的適用範圍意味著鈉離子電池須全面遵守CE標誌及性能要求，但便於高效證明合規的協調標準仍在制定中。中國鈉離子BESS出口商應盡早與歐盟公告機構接觸。僅供參考，請咨詢合格法律及技術顧問。

requirement_topic.en: Supply Chain Due Diligence, Labelling & Battery Passport — Sodium-Ion
requirement_topic.zh: 供应链尽职调查、标签与电池护照——钠离子
requirement_topic.zht: 供應鏈盡職調查、標籤與電池護照——鈉離子

summary.en: Three interrelated obligations under Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 apply to Na-ion industrial batteries: (1) Supply chain due diligence (Article 48): economic operators above turnover thresholds placing industrial batteries on the EU market must maintain an OECD-aligned due diligence policy covering upstream sourcing of cobalt, natural graphite, lithium, and nickel — the four regulated minerals. Sodium-ion batteries typically use hard carbon anodes (sourced from biomass or fossil precursors) rather than lithium; however, some cathode chemistries may still use regulated minerals. The due diligence obligation was postponed from 18 August 2025 to 18 August 2027 by Regulation (EU) 2025/1561 (OJ L 2025/1561, confirmed). (2) Labelling (Article 13): all batteries must carry prescribed labels including capacity, chemistry identifier, hazard symbols, recycled-content share, and a QR code; basic labelling mandatory from 18 August 2025, extended labelling from 18 August 2026 or 18 months after the relevant implementing act, whichever is later. (3) Battery Passport (Article 77): industrial batteries 2 kWh and above must have a digital Battery Passport accessible via QR code containing lifecycle, carbon footprint, state-of-health, and supply chain data, mandatory from 18 February 2027.
summary.zh: 法规（EU）2023/1542下三项相互关联的义务适用于钠离子工业电池：（1）供应链尽职调查（第48条）：超过营业额门槛、将工业电池投放欧盟市场的经营者，须就钴、天然石墨、锂和镍四种受管制矿产的上游采购制定并维护符合OECD标准的尽职调查政策。钠离子电池通常使用硬碳负极（来源于生物质或化石前驱体），而非锂；但部分正极化学体系仍可能使用受管制矿产。尽职调查义务已由法规（EU）2025/1561将强制日期从2025年8月18日推迟至2027年8月18日（OJ L 2025/1561，已确认）。（2）标签（第13条）：所有电池须贴附规定标签，包括容量、化学体系标识、危险符号、再生料比例及二维码；基本标签要求强制日期为2025年8月18日，扩展标签要求为2026年8月18日或相关实施法规生效后18个月（以较晚者为准）。（3）电池护照（第77条）：2 kWh及以上工业电池须附有可通过二维码访问的数字电池护照，包含生命周期、碳足迹、健康状态及供应链数据，强制日期为2027年2月18日。
summary.zht: 法規（EU）2023/1542下三項相互關聯的義務適用於鈉離子工業電池：（1）供應鏈盡職調查（第48條）：超過營業額門檻、將工業電池投放歐盟市場的經營者，須就鈷、天然石墨、鋰和鎳四種受管制礦產的上游採購制定並維護符合OECD標準的盡職調查政策。鈉離子電池通常使用硬碳負極（來源於生物質或化石前驅體），而非鋰；但部分正極化學體系仍可能使用受管制礦產。盡職調查義務已由法規（EU）2025/1561將強制日期從2025年8月18日推遲至2027年8月18日（OJ L 2025/1561，已確認）。（2）標籤（第13條）：所有電池須貼附規定標籤，包括容量、化學體系標識、危險符號、再生料比例及QR碼；基本標籤要求強制日期為2025年8月18日，擴展標籤要求為2026年8月18日或相關實施法規生效後18個月（以較晚者為準）。（3）電池護照（第77條）：2 kWh及以上工業電池須附有可通過QR碼訪問的數位電池護照，包含生命週期、碳足跡、健康狀態及供應鏈數據，強制日期為2027年2月18日。

standards_or_laws: Regulation (EU) 2023/1542, Article 48 (supply chain due diligence)
Regulation (EU) 2023/1542, Article 13 (labelling)
Regulation (EU) 2023/1542, Article 77 (Battery Passport)
Regulation (EU) 2025/1561 (postponement of Article 48 due diligence to 18 August 2027 — confirmed, OJ L 2025/1561)
OECD Due Diligence Guidance for Responsible Supply Chains of Minerals from Conflict-Affected and High-Risk Areas (referenced in Regulation)
Delegated acts on Battery Passport data attributes [UNVERIFIED — finalisation status as of 2026-06-12 not confirmed]

summary.en: No mandatory Chinese equivalent for any of the three obligations. China has voluntary responsible sourcing initiatives (e.g. CAAM Responsible Battery Initiative, CATL ESG disclosures) but no binding domestic law requires battery supply chain due diligence disclosure. Chinese product labelling under GB standards covers basic safety information but not the EU-format chemistry identifier, recycled-content share, or QR-linked digital traceability. No Battery Passport or equivalent digital product record obligation exists in Chinese regulation. Sodium-ion batteries in particular have no dedicated Chinese labelling or traceability framework as of 2026-06-12.
summary.zh: 三项义务均无中国强制对等规定。中国有自愿性负责任采购倡议（如中汽协负责任电池倡议、宁德时代ESG披露），但国内无具约束力的法律要求电池供应链尽职调查披露。中国GB标准下的产品标签涵盖基本安全信息，但不包含欧盟格式的化学体系标识、再生料比例或二维码关联数字追溯。中国法规中无电池护照或对应数字产品档案义务。钠离子电池尤其如此，截至2026-06-12，中国尚无专项标签或追溯框架。
summary.zht: 三項義務均無中國強制對等規定。中國有自願性負責任採購倡議（如中汽協負責任電池倡議、寧德時代ESG披露），但國內無具約束力的法律要求電池供應鏈盡職調查披露。中國GB標準下的產品標籤涵蓋基本安全信息，但不包含歐盟格式的化學體系標識、再生料比例或QR碼關聯數位追溯。中國法規中無電池護照或對應數位產品檔案義務。鈉離子電池尤其如此，截至2026-06-12，中國尚無專項標籤或追溯框架。

standards_or_laws: No binding CN due diligence, labelling-equivalence, or Battery Passport obligation as of 2026-06-12
CAAM Responsible Battery Initiative (voluntary)
GB/T 36276-2023 (basic product marking — no QR traceability or recycled-content fields)
No CN Battery Passport equivalent

gap.en: Na-ion BESS exporters to the EU face three concurrent compliance gaps with no domestic Chinese parallel. The due diligence gap is partially mitigated by Na-ion's reduced dependence on lithium and cobalt — key regulated minerals — but cathode-material sourcing must still be audited and disclosed. The labelling and Battery Passport gaps are chemistry-neutral: all industrial batteries above 2 kWh, including Na-ion, must implement EU-format QR labelling by mid-2026 and a full digital Battery Passport by February 2027. Most Chinese Na-ion manufacturers are at early stages of EU market entry and have typically not invested in the required data infrastructure.
gap.zh: 出口欧盟的钠离子BESS制造商面临三项同步存在的合规缺口，在中国国内均无对应。钠离子对锂和钴（关键受管制矿产）依赖度较低，在一定程度上缓解了尽职调查缺口，但正极材料采购仍须接受审计并予以披露。标签和电池护照缺口与化学体系无关：所有2 kWh以上工业电池，包括钠离子，均须于2026年中前实施欧盟格式二维码标签，并于2027年2月前完成完整数字电池护照。大多数中国钠离子制造商处于欧盟市场进入早期阶段，通常尚未投资所需数据基础设施。
gap.zht: 出口歐盟的鈉離子BESS製造商面臨三項同步存在的合規缺口，在中國國內均無對應。鈉離子對鋰和鈷（關鍵受管制礦產）依賴度較低，在一定程度上緩解了盡職調查缺口，但正極材料採購仍須接受審計並予以披露。標籤和電池護照缺口與化學體系無關：所有2 kWh以上工業電池，包括鈉離子，均須於2026年中前實施歐盟格式QR碼標籤，並於2027年2月前完成完整數位電池護照。大多數中國鈉離子製造商處於歐盟市場進入早期階段，通常尚未投資所需數據基礎設施。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (EU) — labelling from 18 August 2025 (basic) / 18 August 2026 (extended); Battery Passport from 18 February 2027; due diligence from 18 August 2027 (postponed by Reg 2025/1561, confirmed)
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary only — no binding CN equivalent for any of the three obligations

source.publisher: Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: Critical multi-obligation gap. Labelling obligations are already in force; Battery Passport and due diligence deadlines are approaching. Na-ion's lower critical-mineral content may ease due diligence somewhat, but labelling and passport obligations are chemistry-neutral and fully applicable. Chinese Na-ion BESS exporters are structurally unprepared for this regime. Informational only — seek qualified legal and technical advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: 关键多项义务缺口。标签义务已生效；电池护照与尽职调查截止日期临近。钠离子关键矿产含量较低，或可在一定程度上减轻尽职调查负担，但标签和护照义务与化学体系无关，完全适用。中国钠离子BESS出口商在结构层面尚未为该合规体系做好准备。仅供参考，请咨询合格法律及技术顾问。
compliance_verdict.zht: 關鍵多項義務缺口。標籤義務已生效；電池護照與盡職調查截止日期臨近。鈉離子關鍵礦產含量較低，或可在一定程度上減輕盡職調查負擔，但標籤和護照義務與化學體系無關，完全適用。中國鈉離子BESS出口商在結構層面尚未為該合規體系做好準備。僅供參考，請咨詢合格法律及技術顧問。
